steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the size of Tecozautla. The relevant note is the concrete area measurement: Tecozautla covers roughly 535 square kilometers. A sentence focused on services, location, or the number of municipalities would not emphasize physical size.

steps.title: Remove irrelevant details
steps.content: Choice B discusses street lighting and public services generally. Choice C says Hidalgo has 84 municipalities, which gives administrative context but not Tecozautla's area. Choice D says Tecozautla provides services to residents, again shifting attention away from size.

steps.title: Choose the size detail
steps.content: The option that says Tecozautla covers roughly 535 square kilometers directly uses the note that measures its physical area. That is the only choice centered on the student's requested emphasis. The answer is A.
